things.name: Santa Barbara Castle
things.description: Imposing 9th-century castle on Mount Benacantil with panoramic city and sea views

things.name: Explanada de Espana
things.description: Elegant palm-lined promenade with a mosaic pavement of 6.5 million marble tiles

things.name: El Postiguet Beach
things.description: Central city beach with fine sand and views up to the castle

things.name: MARQ Archaeological Museum
things.description: Award-winning museum of Alicante's prehistoric and Roman heritage

things.name: Old Town (El Barrio)
things.description: Charming quarter of narrow streets below the castle with tapas bars and nightlife

things.name: Tabarca Island
things.description: Spain's only inhabited fortified island with a marine reserve for snorkelling

things.name: San Juan Beach
things.description: One of Spain's finest city beaches stretching 7km along the Costa Blanca

things.name: Santa Cruz Quarter
things.description: Colourful hillside neighbourhood with flower-filled balconies and viewpoints

things.name: Alicante City Hall
things.description: Baroque facade with the zero sea level reference point for Spanish altitudes

things.name: Hogueras de San Juan
things.description: Spectacular Midsummer bonfire festival with giant papier-mache figures
